name: Peppered Beef Top Sirloin Steak Master Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pepper, garlic, salt, horseradish, and olive oil in a bowl.
2. Rub the mixture onto the surface of the steak.
3. Refrigerate, covered, for 30-60 minutes.
4. Preheat the broiler.
5. Broil the steak 5 inches from the heat until medium-rare (11-13 minutes per side) or until the internal temperature reaches 145°F-150°F on an instant-read thermometer.
6. Let stand for 5 minutes before slicing half of the steak across grain into 1/4-inch thick slices.
7. Serve immediately. Save the remaining steak to serve with Thai Peanut Sauce. Serves 4.
